transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I need an urgent appointment. My father is having chest discomfort since morning.
AGENT: I understand the urgency. For chest discomfort we strongly recommend coming in as soon as possible. Is he able to travel?
CALLER: Yes, yes he can. We can come right now actually.
AGENT: Please come directly to the emergency department. Dr. Suresh Nair, our cardiologist, is in today and can see him. May I have your name for the records?
CALLER: Vivek Joshi. My father's name is Dattatray Joshi.
AGENT: Thank you Vivek. Please bring any previous medical records or prescriptions. We'll have the team ready. Come straight to emergency reception.
CALLER: Okay, we're on our way. Thank you.
AGENT: Please hurry. We'll be expecting you. Take care.
